title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.110 - What words are actionable
text:
537.110.  What words are actionable. — It is actionable to publish falsely and maliciously, in any manner whatsoever, that any person has been guilty of fornication or adultery.
(RSMo 1939 § 3651) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3261; 1919 § 4216; 1909 § 5424 
Pleadings in libel or slander actions, 509.210
